# SaveMemo Project Setup

## Project Overview
Full-stack memo management application with React frontend and Node.js backend powered by Supabase.

### Features
- Create, read, update, delete memos (CRUD)
- Tags/categories for organization
- Search functionality
- Auto-save capability
- Export/import memo files
- Dark/light theme support
- Responsive design

### Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **UI State**: React Hooks, Context API
